data.palette_mood: Spice-warm and appetizing, grounded by fresh green and generous cream — nourishing and calm, never clinical or diet-app cold.
data.principle: Warm hues carry appetite and care; green grounds them in balance and health; tomato is reserved for decisive confirm moments; cream does most of the background work so the interface breathes.

primary.name: Turmeric Saffron
primary.role: Primary brand colour — warmth, appetite, the golden spice heart of Indian food and the 'rasa' of taste.
primary.usage: Logo mark, brand moments, active plan highlights, primary illustrative fills, key accents on cream.
primary.caution: Fails body-text contrast on white; use for large text (24px+), fills and decorative marks only.

secondary.name: Fresh Basil Green
secondary.role: Secondary brand colour — balance, health, freshness; grounds the warm primary so Rasa reads honest, not indulgent.
secondary.usage: Headers on cream, 'stayed under cap' and macro-fit confirmations, monochrome cream-on-green lockup, dark UI surfaces, links.

accent.name: Ripe Tomato
accent.role: Decisive, tap-worthy accent for the moment of action — the one-tap confirm.
accent.usage: Confirm-order button, price-alert highlights, sparing emphasis. Reserved so a confirm always reads as a confirm.
accent.caution: Never use for error/destructive states — pair with the semantic error red instead so 'confirm' and 'stop' never share a colour.

backgrounds.name: Warm Cream
backgrounds.role: Primary app and marketing background — the calm canvas everything sits on.
backgrounds.usage: Page and screen backgrounds, plan cards, email body.

backgrounds.name: Soft Ivory
backgrounds.usage: Elevated cards, sheets, input fields on cream.

backgrounds.name: Oat
backgrounds.role: Quiet second-level surface and dividers on cream.
backgrounds.usage: Section bands, disabled fills, the spice-dot background pattern.

dark.name: Charred Cardamom
dark.role: Primary text on cream — warm near-black, never pure #000.

dark.name: Ash
dark.role: Placeholder text, muted labels, disabled states.

success.name: Under-Cap Green
success.usage: Stayed-under-budget, macro-fit hit, order confirmed. Reuses the brand green so 'good' and 'balanced' feel the same.

warning.name: Peak-Price Amber
warning.usage: Approaching cap, price nudged up, low-confidence macro estimate flag.

error.name: Allergen Red
error.usage: Allergen hard-block, order failed, over-cap stop. Deliberately deeper and cooler than Ripe Tomato so a block never reads as a confirm.

info.name: Kettle Slate
info.usage: Estimate disclaimers, tips, neutral system messages.

contrast_checks.note: Safe for headers and 16px+ body; good for links.
Decorative and large-display only; never body or UI text.
Primary reversed pairing for headers, nav and the confirm-plan hero.
Passes AA for large/bold button text (18px+ bold). Keep confirm label bold and >=18px.

recommendations: Use Charred Cardamom for body text, never turmeric.
The one-tap confirm button uses Ripe Tomato with bold cream label at 18px+; reserve tomato for confirm actions only.
Allergen and error states use Allergen Red, kept visually distinct from the confirm tomato.
Macro and price figures use Charred Cardamom on cream with tabular figures; colour never carries the meaning alone.
Never rely on the saffron-green pairing for a red-green colour-blind-critical signal; pair colour with an icon and label.

dark_mode.notes: Rasa is cream-first; dark mode is a warm charcoal, not blue-black, keeping the kitchen-warm feel at night.
